scripts.serve: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps dist/index.js serve
scripts.config:validate: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps dist/index.js config validate
scripts.doctor: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps dist/index.js doctor
scripts.test:skill-evolution-v2: node scripts/run-isolated-test.mjs --pattern "proposal generator v2 fixtures|skill evolution auto pipeline can opt into deterministic runtime replay validation|skill evolution low-risk pilot can auto-validate without enabling global auto_validate|skill evolution ops exposes dynamic risk downgrade and eligibility reasons|skill evolution proposal audit endpoint fails a risky draft proposal" test/unit/skill-evolver.test.ts test/integration/observability.api.test.ts
